_fixture_notes: Case 10: Classification fields at boundaries. cuisine: null (null boundary). dietary_category: null (null boundary). dietary_restrictions: [] (empty array boundary). nutritional_tags: ['omega3_strong'] (single-item boundary). meal_types: ['lunch'] (single-item boundary). meal_formats: [] (empty array boundary). Tests how queries handle classifications-with-nulls and how UI badges render when only a subset of fields have values.
name: Walnut & Linseed Porridge Topping
description: Classification boundary fixture — all classification fields at different boundary states.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: Mix {0001}, {0002} and {0003} in a sealed jar. Use a tablespoon per portion as a porridge topping.

notes: Keeps in an airtight jar for two weeks.
